# PROJECT CONTEXT — Auto-generated by AI Session
_Last updated: 2026-02-20_

## What This Project Does
A **Hospital Pre-Authorization Web Application** that automates filling TPA (Third Party Administrator) pre-auth forms for health insurance. The system:
1. Accepts patient demographics + clinical documents (from HIS or uploads)
2. Runs OCR via Gemini Vision (dev) / Google Document AI (production) to extract key-value pairs
3. Semantically maps OCR output keys to coordinate-based JSON field schemas
4. Populates TPA pre-auth PDF forms at precise coordinates
5. Renders a final PDF for review and submission to insurance companies

## Tech Stack Detected
| Layer | Technology | Status |
|-------|-----------|--------|
| Form Analysis | Gemini 2.5 Flash + pdfplumber hybrid | ✅ Working |
| PDF Filling | PyPDF2 + reportlab (overlay approach) | ✅ Working |
| Field Mapping | MappingEngine (exact + alias + fuzzy + Gemini fallback) | ✅ Built & Tested |
| OCR | Gemini Vision (dev) / Document AI (prod) | ✅ Built |
| Form Engine | Service wrapper for tpa_form_filler.py | ✅ Built & Tested |
| Backend | FastAPI + uvicorn | ✅ Built & Tested |
| Auth | JWT (pyjwt, 8-hour expiry) | ✅ Built |
| HIS Integration | REST API stub with mock data | ✅ Built |
| Frontend | React or Next.js (planned) | ❌ Not built |
| Database | PostgreSQL or SQLite (planned) | ❌ Not built |
| Environment | Python 3.12, venv, Windows | ✅ Set up |

## Directory Structure & Purpose
```
├── .env                          # API keys (GEMINI_API_KEY, GEMINI_MODEL)
├── templates/                    # 33 raw TPA pre-auth PDF form templates
├── analyzed/                     # Coordinate-mapped JSON schemas (per form)
│   ├── Ericson TPA Preauth.json  # ✅ Analyzed + manually corrected (90 fields)
│   ├── Ericson TPA Preauth_gemini_raw.json  # Raw Gemini response backup
│   └── amrita_form_structure.json           # Legacy structure (unused)
├── output/                       # Filled PDF output
│   └── Ericson TPA Preauth_filled.pdf       # Latest test output
├── gemini_analyzer.py            # v2 Gemini+pdfplumber hybrid analyzer (639 lines)
├── tpa_form_filler.py            # PDF form filler engine (467 lines)
├── quick_test.py                 # Quick end-to-end test runner
├── sample_test_data.json         # Test data with exact field_id keys
├── fix_coordinates.py            # Coordinate correction script (47 fixes)
├── analyze_pdf.py                # Legacy pdfplumber-only analyzer
├── check_overlaps.py             # Utility: detect coordinate collisions
├── get_ground_truth.py           # Utility: extract exact pdfplumber positions
├── check_coords*.py              # Utility: coordinate debugging scripts
├── check_pages*.py               # Utility: page dimension checks
├── verify_output.py              # Utility: output verification
├── requirements.txt              # Python dependencies
├── MASTER_BUILD_PROMPT.md        # Master build prompt for AI sessions
├── README.md                     # Project readme
├── COPILOT_SETUP_GUIDE.md        # Setup guide
├── EXPECTED_OUTPUT.md            # Expected output documentation
└── PROJECT_SUMMARY.md            # Project summary
├── services/                     # Service layer modules
│   ├── __init__.py
│   ├── mapping_engine.py         # Semantic field mapping (exact+alias+fuzzy+Gemini)
│   ├── ocr_service.py            # OCR via Gemini Vision / Document AI
│   ├── form_engine.py            # Form population service wrapper
│   └── his_service.py            # HIS integration stub with mock data
├── field_mapping.json            # 90 field IDs with 460 aliases for mapping
├── app.py                        # FastAPI backend (all REST API routes)
├── uploads/                      # Uploaded documents (runtime)
```

## Open Problems Identified
1. **Only 1 of 33 forms analyzed**: Remaining 32 templates need Gemini analysis (Phase 3.7)
2. **No frontend**: React/Next.js UI not built (Phase 3.6)
3. **No database**: In-memory state only; need PostgreSQL/SQLite for production
4. **HIS stub**: `services/his_service.py` uses mock data; real API integration pending
5. **OCR not tested with real docs**: `services/ocr_service.py` built but needs real document testing
6. **Some coordinate misalignments remain**: Policy number, employee ID may need manual tuning

## Environment Variables Required
```
GEMINI_API_KEY=<Google Gemini API key>
GEMINI_MODEL=gemini-2.5-flash
JWT_SECRET=<secret for JWT token signing>
# Future:
# GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=<GCP project ID>
# DOCUMENT_AI_PROCESSOR_ID=<Document AI processor ID>
# DATABASE_URL=<PostgreSQL connection string>
# HIS_API_BASE_URL=<Hospital Information System API endpoint>
```

## Coordinate System Reference
- **pdfplumber**: Origin at top-left, y increases downward
- **reportlab**: Origin at bottom-left, y increases upward
- **Conversion**: `reportlab_y = page_height - pdfplumber_y`
- **Page heights** vary per page (854.64, 852.48, 855.36, 852.84, 855.0, 853.2)
- **PDF type**: Image-based (no vector checkboxes or form fields) — requires coordinate overlay approach
